en-UK.name: Beilu Browser Sense
en-UK.description: Browser page awareness — inject page content into AI context.
en-UK.description_markdown: **Beilu Browser Sense** receives browser page snapshots from a userscript and injects them as context for the AI.
en-UK.author: 凛倾

zh-CN.name: 贝露的浏览器感知
zh-CN.description: 浏览器页面感知 — 将页面内容注入 AI 上下文
zh-CN.description_markdown: **贝露的浏览器感知** 接收来自油猴脚本的浏览器页面快照，作为上下文注入给 AI。
zh-CN.author: 凛倾
